description: You are an Electrical Designer. Update the building's Single Line Diagram (SLD) in '~/Diagrams/building_4_sld.drawio' to include a new EV charging station distribution panel based on the engineering specifications in '~/Desktop/project_memo_ev_expansion.txt'. The updated diagram must include a new 200A 3-Pole breaker on the Main Switchboard (MSB), a new Distribution Panel labeled 'DP-EV', a feeder connection from the MSB to DP-EV, and text annotations for the feeder wire size and panel ratings exactly as specified in the memo. Export the final diagram as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/exports/building_4_sld_updated.pdf'.
